items.title: Where In The World Cup Is Jameis Winston?
items.summary: Here’s a look at some of the best moments from Jameis Winston’s World Cup journey.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Spain into World Cup final after victory over France
items.summary: Spain are into the 2026 World Cup final after goals from Mikel Oyarzabal and Pedro Porro see them convincingly beat France 2-0 in their semi-final in Dallas.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Axar, Gill deliver India's first win of UK tour
items.summary: Half-centurions Root and Dawson revived England after a collapse after Brook opted to bat
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
